file_name: UNITEDNATIONALBANCORP_03_03_1999-EX-99-Outsourcing Agreement with the BISYS Group, Inc..txt

perturbation.original_text: "United Financial Services has allowed United National to realize significant efficiencies through the sharing of technology and processing costs. Nevertheless, we believe that the enhanced capabilities which BISYS offers are better matched to the future direction of our Bank."
perturbation.changed_text: "United Financial Services has not allowed United National to realize significant efficiencies through the sharing of technology and processing costs. Nevertheless, we believe that the enhanced capabilities which BISYS offers may or may not be better matched to the future direction of our Bank."
perturbation.explanation: The original text states United Financial Services DID allow for significant efficiencies, but this version is stating that it DID NOT, which is a contradiction. Also, where it was explicitly stated before that BISYS offers better enhanced capabilities to match the banks future direction, there is now uncertainty due to the insertion of 'may or may not', which contradicts the sentiment expressed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: "United Financial Services has not allowed United National to realize significant efficiencies through the sharing of technology and processing costs. Nevertheless, we believe that the enhanced capabilities which BISYS offers may or may not be better matched to the future direction of our Bank."
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly states that United Financial Services *did* allow for efficiencies, while the changed text states that it *did not*. This is a direct contradiction. Furthermore, the original text expressed a definitive belief that BISYS offered better capabilities, which is now uncertain ('may or may not'). The contradicted text is precisely the changed text, further emphasizing the in-text contradiction created by the modifications.
